definition: horizontal direction of the movement of the tidal current driven by astronomical tides at a given location

definition_ml.en: horizontal direction of the movement of the tidal current driven by astronomical tides at a given location

source_document: Federal Maritime and Hydrographical Agency, Germany
note: The tidal current direction is defined as “going to” in contrast to wind and wave direction.

note_ml.en: The tidal current direction is defined as “going to” in contrast to wind and wave direction.

remark: In practice the direction is applied in textual form either by abbreviations of the geographic directions or in full text instead of being applied in nautical degree, i.e. degree relative to true north positive clockwise.

remark_ml.en: In practice the direction is applied in textual form either by abbreviations of the geographic directions or in full text instead of being applied in nautical degree, i.e. degree relative to true north positive clockwise.
